prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime illustration of Noel, a blonde gothic-lolita maid heroine performing a superhero landing in the middle of a ruined city street. She is crouched low with one fist smashed into cracked pavement, one knee forward, the other leg bent back, body leaning toward the viewer in a powerful dynamic perspective. Her face is deliberately obscured by a centered opaque tan square censor block, while her long curly golden blonde hair explodes upward and outward from the impact, decorated with a frilly white maid headpiece. She wears an elaborate black, pale pink, white, and gold frilled maid dress with layered ruffles, puffed sleeves, gold trim, a black bodice, pink-and-white apron details, white thigh-high stockings, glossy black Mary Jane shoes, and white cuffs with gold buttons. The environment is a cinematic disaster scene: tall shattered buildings forming a narrow urban canyon, broken stone slabs, dust clouds, debris and chunks of asphalt suspended in the air, impact cracks radiating from her fist, and a thin vertical blue-white energy beam descending from the sky behind her head. Use extreme low-angle perspective, intense motion, wind-swept fabric, flying rubble, volumetric sunlight breaking through smoke, high-detail anime rendering, sharp linework, glossy highlights, ornate costume details, dramatic backlighting, and a sense of explosive impact. Aspect ratio 3:4, full-body composition, no text.
